code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  mut have = false
  mut neg = false
  mut val = 0

  while i <= n
    mut b = 32
    if i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(x)
        b = x
      when None
        b = 32
      end
    end

    let is_space = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10

    if is_space
      if have
        let signed = if neg
          -val
        else
          val
        end
        let sq = signed * signed
        if first
          out = "#{sq}"
          first = false
        else
          out = "#{out} #{sq}"
        end
        have = false
        neg = false
        val = 0
      end
    else if b == 45 and not have
      neg = true
      have = true
      val = 0
    else
      val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
      have = true
    end

    i = i + 1
  end

  println(out)
end
